landingPage.title: How to prove your identity at a Post Office
landingPage.firstStepTitle: Get your Post Office customer letter from GOV.UK

firstStep.one: Enter the details from your photo ID on GOV.UK.
firstStep.two: Then select which Post Office you want to take your photo ID to.
firstStep.three: We'll send you a confirmation email with a link to download your Post Office customer letter.

secondStep.one: Take your Post Office customer letter and photo ID to your chosen Post Office. Or go to any
secondStep.two: A member of Post Office staff will scan your photo ID and take a photo of you.
secondStep.three: You must go to the Post Office within 10 days of getting your confirmation email.

thirdStep.one: You'll get an email about the result of your identity check - usually within a day of going to the Post Office.

photoIdSelectionThinFile.title: Choose which photo ID you can take to a Post Office
photoIdSelectionThinFile.content: Based on what you've told us and the checks we've done, you’ll need one of the following types of photo ID to prove your identity at a Post Office.
photoIdSelectionThinFile.photocopyWarning: You cannot use a photocopy or digital copy of your passport.

photoIdSelection.title: Choose which photo ID you can take to a Post Office
photoIdSelection.content: You must take the original photo ID document, not a photocopy.
photoIdSelection.expiryWarning: Your photo ID must not have expired.

photoIdExpiry.title: Your photo ID has expired
photoIdExpiry.content: You need valid photo ID to prove your identity.
photoIdExpiry.prompt: What would you like to do?

checkDetails.title: Check your answers
checkDetails.ukDlAddress: Is the address on your driving licence the same as your current address?
checkDetails.euDlAddress: Does your driving licence have your current address on it?
checkDetails.idCardAddress: Does your national identity card have your current address on it?
checkDetails.hasExpiryDate: Does your photo ID have an expiry date?

ukDlAddressCheck.title: Does your driving licence have your current address on it?
ukDlAddressCheck.context: If your driving licence has your previous address on it, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.
ukDlAddressCheck.change-how: How do I change the address on my driving licence?
ukDlAddressCheck.change-link: You must update your driving licence when you move. Tell DVLA you've changed address (opens in a new tab)

euDrivingLicenceAddressCheck.title: Does your driving licence have your current address on it?
euDrivingLicenceAddressCheck.context: If your driving licence has your previous address on it, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.

eeaIdCardAddressCheck.title: Does your national identity card have your current address on it?
eeaIdCardAddressCheck.context: If your national identity card has your previous address on it, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.

eeaIdentityCardCountrySelector.title: Select which country your national identity card is from
eeaIdentityCardCountrySelector.content: If the country your national identity card is from is not on the list, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.
eeaIdentityCardCountrySelector.link: The country my national identity card is from is not on the list

euDrivingLicenceCountrySelector.title: Select which country your driving licence is from
euDrivingLicenceCountrySelector.content: If the country your driving licence is from is not on the list, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.
euDrivingLicenceCountrySelector.link: The country my driving licence is from is not on the list

nonUkPassportCountrySelector.title: Select which country your passport is from
nonUkPassportCountrySelector.content: If the country your passport is from is not on the list, you'll need to choose another type of photo ID.
nonUkPassportCountrySelector.link: The country my passport is from is not on the list

unrecoverable.title: Sorry, there is a problem with the service
unrecoverable.subTitle: We cannot prove your identity right now.
unrecoverable.description: Go back to the service you were trying to use and start again. You can look for the service using your search engine or find it from the GOV.UK homepage.
unrecoverable.contactMeLink: Contact the GOV.UK One Login team (opens in new tab)

pageNotFound.title: Page not found
content: If you typed the web address, check it’s correct.
If you pasted the web address, check you copied the entire address.
You can also go back to the service you were trying to use and start again. You can look for the service using your search engine or find it from the GOV.UK homepage.
Go to the GOV.UK homepage
Contact the GOV.UK account team (opens in a new tab)
